CW7ExtractState.description: State model derived from CW7Extract TLA+ spec

GWTIndices.description: Verifier for invariant GWTIndices from CW7Extract spec

ValidPhase.description: Verifier for invariant ValidPhase from CW7Extract spec

OutputReqsShape.message:
OutputReqsShape violation: phase = "complete" =>
        /\ Len(output_reqs) = NumReqs
        /\ \A k \in 1..Len(output_reqs) :
            /\ ...
OutputReqsShape.description: Verifier for invariant OutputReqsShape from CW7Extract spec

OutputGWTsShape.message:
OutputGWTsShape violation: phase = "complete" =>
        /\ Len(output_gwts) = Cardinality(GWTIndices)
        /\ \A k \in 1..Len(output_gwts) :...
OutputGWTsShape.description: Verifier for invariant OutputGWTsShape from CW7Extract spec

CriterionIdPrefixOK.message:
CriterionIdPrefixOK violation: phase = "complete" =>
        \A k \in 1..Len(output_gwts) :
            output_gwts[k].criterion_id.prefix = CW7_PREFIX
CriterionIdPrefixOK.description: Verifier for invariant CriterionIdPrefixOK from CW7Extract spec

NameConditional.message:
NameConditional violation: phase = "complete" =>
        \A k \in 1..Len(output_gwts) :
            "name" \in DOMAIN output_gwts[k] <=> ~output...
NameConditional.description: Verifier for invariant NameConditional from CW7Extract spec

NoOutputOnError.description: Verifier for invariant NoOutputOnError from CW7Extract spec

SuccessImpliesValidSession.description: Verifier for invariant SuccessImpliesValidSession from CW7Extract spec

ErrorOnZeroSessions.description: Verifier for invariant ErrorOnZeroSessions from CW7Extract spec

ErrorOnMultiSessions.description: Verifier for invariant ErrorOnMultiSessions from CW7Extract spec

OnlyGWTFormatIncluded.message:
OnlyGWTFormatIncluded violation: phase = "complete" =>
        Len(output_gwts) =
            Cardinality({i \in 1..NumAcRows : AcFormats[i] = GWT_FOR...
OnlyGWTFormatIncluded.description: Verifier for invariant OnlyGWTFormatIncluded from CW7Extract spec

Invariants.message:
Invariants violation: ValidPhase
    /\ OutputReqsShape
    /\ OutputGWTsShape
    /\ CriterionIdPrefixOK
    /\ NameConditional
    /\ NoO...
Invariants.description: Verifier for invariant Invariants from CW7Extract spec

assert_GWTIndices.description: Test assertion for GWTIndices from CW7Extract spec

assert_ValidPhase.description: Test assertion for ValidPhase from CW7Extract spec

assert_OutputReqsShape.condition:
phase = "complete" implies
        and Len(output_reqs) = NumReqs
        and \A k in 1..Len(output_reqs) :
            and "id"   in DOMAIN output_reqs[k]
            and "text" in DOMAIN output_reqs[k]
assert_OutputReqsShape.message:
Assertion failed: OutputReqsShape — phase = "complete" =>
        /\ Len(output_reqs) = NumReqs
        /\ \A k \in 1..Len(output_reqs) :
            /\ ...
assert_OutputReqsShape.description: Test assertion for OutputReqsShape from CW7Extract spec

assert_OutputGWTsShape.condition:
phase = "complete" implies
        and Len(output_gwts) = Cardinality(GWTIndices)
        and \A k in 1..Len(output_gwts) :
            and "criterion_id" in DOMAIN output_gwts[k]
            and "given_c"      in DOMAIN output_gwts[k]
            and "when_c"       in DOMAIN output_gwts[k]
            and "then_c"       in DOMAIN output_gwts[k]
            and "parent_req"   in DOMAIN output_gwts[k]
assert_OutputGWTsShape.message:
Assertion failed: OutputGWTsShape — phase = "complete" =>
        /\ Len(output_gwts) = Cardinality(GWTIndices)
        /\ \A k \in 1..Len(output_gwts) :...
assert_OutputGWTsShape.description: Test assertion for OutputGWTsShape from CW7Extract spec

assert_CriterionIdPrefixOK.condition:
phase = "complete" implies
        \A k in 1..Len(output_gwts) :
            output_gwts[k].criterion_id.prefix = CW7_PREFIX
assert_CriterionIdPrefixOK.message:
Assertion failed: CriterionIdPrefixOK — phase = "complete" =>
        \A k \in 1..Len(output_gwts) :
            output_gwts[k].criterion_id.prefix = CW7_PREFIX
assert_CriterionIdPrefixOK.description: Test assertion for CriterionIdPrefixOK from CW7Extract spec

assert_NameConditional.condition:
phase = "complete" implies
        \A k in 1..Len(output_gwts) :
            "name" in DOMAIN output_gwts[k] <implies ~output_gwts[k].when_was_empty
assert_NameConditional.message:
Assertion failed: NameConditional — phase = "complete" =>
        \A k \in 1..Len(output_gwts) :
            "name" \in DOMAIN output_gwts[k] <=> ~output...
assert_NameConditional.description: Test assertion for NameConditional from CW7Extract spec

assert_NoOutputOnError.condition:
phase in {"err_no_session", "err_multi_session"} implies
        output_reqs = <<>> and output_gwts = <<>>
assert_NoOutputOnError.message:
Assertion failed: NoOutputOnError — phase \in {"err_no_session", "err_multi_session"} =>
        output_reqs = <<>> /\ output_gwts = <<>>
assert_NoOutputOnError.description: Test assertion for NoOutputOnError from CW7Extract spec

assert_SuccessImpliesValidSession.description: Test assertion for SuccessImpliesValidSession from CW7Extract spec

assert_ErrorOnZeroSessions.description: Test assertion for ErrorOnZeroSessions from CW7Extract spec

assert_ErrorOnMultiSessions.description: Test assertion for ErrorOnMultiSessions from CW7Extract spec

assert_OnlyGWTFormatIncluded.condition:
phase = "complete" implies
        Len(output_gwts) =
            Cardinality({i in 1..NumAcRows : AcFormats[i] = GWT_FORMAT})
assert_OnlyGWTFormatIncluded.message:
Assertion failed: OnlyGWTFormatIncluded — phase = "complete" =>
        Len(output_gwts) =
            Cardinality({i \in 1..NumAcRows : AcFormats[i] = GWT_FOR...
assert_OnlyGWTFormatIncluded.description: Test assertion for OnlyGWTFormatIncluded from CW7Extract spec

assert_Invariants.condition:
ValidPhase
    and OutputReqsShape
    and OutputGWTsShape
    and CriterionIdPrefixOK
    and NameConditional
    and NoOutputOnError
    and SuccessImpliesValidSession
    and ErrorOnZeroSessions
    and ErrorOnMultiSessions
    and OnlyGWTFormatIncluded
assert_Invariants.message:
Assertion failed: Invariants — ValidPhase
    /\ OutputReqsShape
    /\ OutputGWTsShape
    /\ CriterionIdPrefixOK
    /\ NameConditional
    /\ NoO...
assert_Invariants.description: Test assertion for Invariants from CW7Extract spec
